title: Hero background image at 45% opacity, larger logo, remove decorative circle, fix WhatsApp number

requirements.summary: Add semi-transparent background image to hero section at 45% opacity
acceptanceCriteria: The hero section displays the provided background image behind all content
The background image opacity is 45% (the image appears semi-transparent)
All hero text, logo, and buttons remain fully legible and unaffected by the background opacity
The background image covers the full hero section without stretching or letterboxing

file_operations.description: Add a background image layer using the generated asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png. Implement as an absolutely positioned div or pseudo-element behind all existing content with opacity set to 0.45, object-fit: cover, and full section coverage. Ensure all text, logo, CTA buttons, and stats remain fully visible and unchanged in z-index stacking.

requirements.summary: Increase logo size in hero section while maintaining aspect ratio
acceptanceCriteria: The logo in the hero section is visibly larger than before
The logo is not cropped or distorted — object-fit: contain is preserved
The logo aspect ratio remains correct

file_operations.description: Increase the logo img element dimensions (width/height or max-width/max-height) by approximately 20-30% compared to current values. Preserve object-fit: contain and maintain the existing aspect ratio to prevent distortion.

requirements.summary: Remove large decorative circle element from hero section center
acceptanceCriteria: The large decorative circle element no longer appears in the hero section
All other hero section elements (text, logo, buttons, stats) remain unchanged and properly laid out

file_operations.description: Locate and delete the large decorative circle div element rendered in the center/middle of the hero section (likely an absolutely positioned div with border-radius: 50%). Remove only that specific element without altering any other layout, positioning, or content.

requirements.summary: Fix WhatsApp button to use correct phone number +916265381119
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Chat on WhatsApp' button links to 'https://wa.me/916265381119'
Tapping the button opens WhatsApp with the correct number +91 6265381119
No other UI changes are made to the contact section

file_operations.description: Update the WhatsApp CTA button href attribute to 'https://wa.me/916265381119' (no spaces or dashes). Also update any hardcoded phone number text displayed near this button to show '+91 6265381119' for user-facing display consistency.
